## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New documentation page
- [ ] Improvement to existing documentation
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, incorrect command)
- [ ] Site feature or component
- [ ] Tooling / CI / configuration
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this addresses, e.g. "Closes #12". Write "None" if there isn't one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally with no broken links
- [ ] New pages include estimated time, difficulty, requirements, expected outcome, summary, and next steps
- [ ] Every command includes an explanation, expected output, common errors, and recovery steps
- [ ] Navigation (`sidebars.ts` / category files) updated if pages were added, moved, or renamed
- [ ] All download links point to official sources only (no unofficial APK mirrors)

## Screenshots

<!-- For visual changes, add before/after screenshots. Redact personal info. Write "N/A" otherwise. -->

## Tested commands

<!-- List the documented commands you actually ran, and on what device/setup.
     Write "N/A" if this PR contains no commands. -->

## Source links

<!-- Link the official documentation or repositories that back any factual claims.
     Write "N/A" for pure fixes. -->

## Documentation reuse check

<!-- Confirm you searched docs/ for existing coverage of this topic.
     Name the canonical pages you link to instead of duplicating. -->

## Beginner-readability check

<!-- Confirm a reader with no Linux experience can follow this change:
     jargon defined or linked to the glossary, no steps assumed. -->
